subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to follow up after the conference — I'd be glad to get something formal on the calendar.

Here are three slots that work on our end for a 30-minute call:

  • Tuesday, 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Wednesday, 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00 UTC
  • Thursday, 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Just let me know your preference and I'll send a calendar invite right away.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share individual internal contact information. For the right points of contact, please refer to our public website. Once we've had our initial call, we'll make sure the appropriate senior stakeholders are involved from our side.

Thanks again for reaching out — looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent — Company
